creator: jh@saunalahti.fi
text:
On 2009-09-14, Aditya Sarawgi wrote:
>  I think this problem persists only on amd64.

I was unable reproduce the problem with the command give in audit trail.
Are you sure that the problem is reproducible after r186740 (head) or
r187386 (stable/7)? Those revisions fixed a bug with identical symptoms.

-- 
Jaakko
